title: File Type
description: TYPO3 CMS Content Blocks File Type

name.description: Unique identifier for the Content Block in the format vendor/content-block-name

prefixFields.description: Field identifiers will be prefixed with the Content Block name.

prefixType.description: Determines how to prefix the field if prefixFields is enabled.

vendorPrefix.description: Will be used instead of the vendor part of name

typeName.description: The typeName has to be one of these keywords

basics.description: Basics which are appended after the fields definition.

useExistingField.description: Enables extending of existing fields defined by TCA.

prefixType.description: Determines how to prefix the field if prefixField is enabled.

displayCond.description: Can be used to display the field only under certain conditions.

onChange.description: Can be used to trigger a reload of the Content Type when this specific field is changed.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

cols.description: Abstract value for the width of the field

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

enableRichtext.description: Enables richtext editing for the field.

enableTabulator.description: Enabling this allows to use tabs in a text field

fixedFont.description: Enables a fixed-width font (monospace) for the text field

is_in.description: Evaluates whether the text contains this value

nullable.description: Allows database null values for the field

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

richtextConfiguration.description: Configuration for the richtext editor, if enabled.

rows.description: Number of rows for the textarea field

searchable.description: Enables search functionality for the field

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

is_in.description: Evaluates whether the text contains this value

mode.description: This property is related to the placeholder property. When defined, a checkbox will appear above the field.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

size.description: Abstract value for the width of the field

slider.description: Render a value slider next to the field.

step.description: Set the step size the slider will use.

width.description: Define the width of the slider in pixels.

allowedTypes.description: List of allowed link types. If empty, all types are allowed.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

allowedOptions.description: Display certain options in the link browser. To allow all options, skip this configuration. To deny all options, set this configuration to [] (empty array).

allowedFileExtensions.description: List of allowed file extensions. If empty, all extensions are allowed.

browserTitle.description: Allows to set a different title attribute for the Link Browser icon, defaults to Link.

enableBrowser.description: To disable the Link Browser, set this option to false.

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

mode.description: This property is related to the placeholder property. When defined, a checkbox will appear above the field.

nullable.description: Allows database null values for the field

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

searchable.description: Enables search functionality for the field

size.description: Abstract value for the width of the field

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

onlyCountries.description: Restrict the displayed countries (ISO2 or ISO3 codes) to the ones listed.

excludeCountries.description: Exclude the countries (ISO2 or ISO3 codes) in this list from being displayed in the selector.

labelField.description: The field to be used for displaying the label of the country.

prioritizedCountries.description: Countries (ISO2 or ISO3 codes) which are listed before all others countries.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

dbType.description: If set, the date or time will not be stored as timestamp, but as native date, time or datetime field in the database.

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

format.description: Sets the output format if the field is set to readOnly.

mode.description: This property is related to the placeholder property. When defined, a checkbox will appear above the field.

nullable.description: Allows database null values for the field

range.description: Defines a range within the date must be

lower.description: Defines the earliest date. Can be of format Y-m-d or timestamp.

upper.description: Defines the latest date. Can be of format Y-m-d or timestamp.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

searchable.description: Enables search functionality for the field

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

cols.description: Abstract value for the width of the field

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

enableCodeEditor.description: The JSON value is rendered in a code editor.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

rows.description: Number of rows for the JSON editor

searchable.description: Enables search functionality for the field

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

enableCopyToClipboard.description: Allows to copy the UUID to the clipboard of the operating system.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

searchable.description: Enables search functionality for the field

size.description: Abstract value for the width of the field

version.description: Defines the UUID version to be used

allowNonIdValues.description: Only useful if foreign_table is enabled. If set, then values which are not integer ids will be allowed.

expandAll.description: All select groups are initially expanded.

authMode.description: Authorization mode for the selector box

autoSizeMax.description: The select field will never be smaller than the specified size and never larger than the value of autoSizeMax.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

dbFieldLength.description: Defines the length of the database field.

dontRemapTablesOnCopy.description: A list of tables which should not be remapped to the new element uids if the field holds elements that are copied in the session.

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

disableNoMatchingValueElement.description: If set, then no element is inserted if the current value does not match any of the existing elements.

exclusiveKeys.description: List of keys that exclude any other keys in a select box where multiple items could be selected.

allowedExtensions.description: List of file extensions to select. If blank, all files are selected.

folder.description: Specifying a folder from where files are added to the item array.

foreign_table.description: The item-array will be filled with records from the table defined here

foreign_table_item_group.description: References a specific field in the foreign table, which holds an item group identifier.

foreign_table_prefix.description: Label prefix to the title of the records from the foreign-table.

foreign_table_where.description: The items from foreign_table are selected with this WHERE clause.

itemGroups.description: Contains an array of key-value pairs. The key contains the identifier, the value contains the label

items.description: Contains the elements for the selector box

value.description: The value stored in the database

icon.description: Icon to be displayed next to the label

group.description: The key of the item group

itemsProcFunc.description: (Deprecated: Use itemsProcessors instead) PHP method which is called to fill or manipulate the items array

localizeReferencesAtParentLocalization.description: Defines whether referenced records should be localized when the current record gets localized. This only applies if references are not stored using MM tables.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the select field

minitems.description: Minimum number of items allowed in the select field

MM.description: This value contains the name of the table in which to store a MM relation. It is used together with foreign_table.

MM_match_fields.description: Array of field => value pairs to both insert and match against when writing/reading MM relations.

MM_opposite_field.description: If you want to make a MM relation editable from the foreign side (bidirectional) of the relation as well, you need to set MM_opposite_field on the foreign side to the field name on the local side.

MM_oppositeUsage.description: In a MM bidirectional relation using match fields the opposite side needs to know about the match fields for certain operations

MM_table_where.description: Additional where clause used when reading MM relations.

multiple.description: Allows the same item more than once in a list.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: If set to 1 (default), displays a select drop-down, else a select box of given size.

dataProvider.description: Allows to define a custom data provider class for use cases where special data preparation is necessary.

childrenField.description: Field name of the foreign_table that references the uid of the child records.

parentField.description: Field name of the foreign_table that references the uid of the parent record

startingPoints.description: Allows to set multiple records as roots for tree records.

showHeader.description: Whether to show the header of the tree that contains a field to filter the records and allows to expand or collapse all nodes.

expandAll.description: All select groups are initially expanded.

maxLevels.description: The maximal amount of levels to be rendered (can be used to stop possible recursions)

nonSelectableLevels.description: Comma-separated list of levels that will not be selectable, by default the root node (which is "0") cannot be selected

authMode.description: Authorization mode for the selector box

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

disableNoMatchingValueElement.description: If set, then no element is inserted if the current value does not match any of the existing elements.

itemGroups.description: Contains an array of key-value pairs. The key contains the identifier, the value contains the label

items.description: Contains the elements for the selector box

value.description: The value stored in the database

icon.description: Icon to be displayed next to the label

group.description: The key of the item group

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: If set to 1 (default), displays a select drop-down, else a select box of given size.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

cols.description: In how many columns the checkboxes will be shown. Makes sense only if the 'items' property is defining multiple checkboxes.

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created. Attention: Bit value!

items.description: Contains the elements for the selector box

invertStateDisplay.description: A checkbox is marked checked if the database bit is not set and vice versa.

iconIdentifierChecked.description: An optional icon shown is selected / on. If not set, a check mark icon is used.

iconIdentifierUnchecked.description: An optional icon shown selected / on. If not set, no icon is show (check mark icon not displayed).

labelChecked.description: Text shown if element is selected / on.

labelUnchecked.description: Text shown if element is not selected.

itemsProcFunc.description: (Deprecated: Use itemsProcessors instead) PHP method which is called to fill or manipulate the items array

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

invertStateDisplay.description: A checkbox is marked checked if the database bit is not set and vice versa.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

exclusiveKeys.description: List of keys that exclude any other keys in a select box where multiple items could be selected.

foreign_table_where.description: The items from foreign_table are selected with this WHERE clause.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the select field

minitems.description: Minimum number of items allowed in the select field

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: Maximal number of elements to be displayed in the tree by default

dataProvider.description: Allows to define a custom data provider class for use cases where special data preparation is necessary.

startingPoints.description: Allows to set multiple records as roots for tree records.

showHeader.description: Whether to show the header of the tree that contains a field to filter the records and allows to expand or collapse all nodes.

expandAll.description: All select groups are initially expanded.

maxLevels.description: The maximal amount of levels to be rendered (can be used to stop possible recursions)

nonSelectableLevels.description: Comma-separated list of levels that will not be selectable, by default the root node (which is "0") cannot be selected

collapseAll.description: Show all child-records collapsed (if false, all are expanded)

expandSingle.description: Show only one child-record expanded each time. If a collapsed record is clicked, the currently open one collapses and the clicked one expands.

createNewRelationLinkTitle.description: Overrides the link text and title of the "Create new relation" button with a localized string. Only useful, if the element browser is enabled.

addMediaLinkTitle.description: Overrides the link text and title of the "Add media by URL" button with a localized string. Only useful, if the element browser is enabled.

uploadFilesLinkTitle.description: Overrides the link text and title of the "Select & upload files" button with a localized string. Only useful, if the element browser is enabled.

showPossibleLocalizationRecords.description: Show unlocalized files which are in the original language, but not yet localized.

showAllLocalizationLink.description: Defines whether to show the "localize all records" link to fetch untranslated records from the original language.

showSynchronizationLink.description: Defines whether to show a "synchronize" link to update to a 1:1 translation with the original language.

headerThumbnail.description: Defines the width and height of the preview thumbnail

fileUploadAllowed.description: Defines whether the button "Select & upload file" should be rendered.

fileByUrlAllowed.description: Defines whether the button "Add media by URL" should be rendered. This button is used to include media URLs from, for example, Vimeo or YouTube.

elementBrowserEnabled.description: Hides or displays the element browser button in inline records

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

disableMovingChildrenWithParent.description: Disables that child records get moved along with their parent records.

enableCascadingDelete.description: Usually when the parent record is deleted all attached sys_file_references are deleted. This default behaviour can be disabled here.

disallowed.description: An array of file extensions that are not allowed even though they are listed in the property allowed

extendedPalette.description: Disable this option, if you don't need additional fields 'crop', 'alternative' or 'link'.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of files that can be attached

overrideChildTca.description: Override the TCA of the sys_file_reference records representing the files attached to this record.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

items.description: Contains the elements for the selector box

value.description: The value stored in the database

itemsProcFunc.description: (Deprecated: Use itemsProcessors instead) PHP method which is called to fill or manipulate the items array

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

autoSizeMax.description: The select field will never be smaller than the specified size and never larger than the value of autoSizeMax.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

hideDeleteIcon.description: Removes the delete icon next to the selector box.

hideMoveIcons.description: Removes the move icons next to the selector box.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the select field

minitems.description: Minimum number of items allowed in the select field

multiple.description: Allows the same item more than once in a list.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: If set to 1 (default), displays a select drop-down, else a select box of given size.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

hashed.description: Whether the password should be hashed with the configured hashing algorithm.

mode.description: This property is related to the placeholder property. When defined, a checkbox will appear above the field.

nullable.description: Allows database null values for the field

passwordGenerator.description: The control renders a button next to the password field allowing the user to generate a random password based on defined rules.

passwordPolicy.description: The password policy will ensure, that the new password complies with the configured password policy.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

size.description: Abstract value for the width of the field

autoSizeMax.description: The select field will never be smaller than the specified size and never larger than the value of autoSizeMax.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

dontRemapTablesOnCopy.description: A list of tables which should not be remapped to the new element uids if the field holds elements that are copied in the session.

elementBrowserEntryPoints.description: By default, the last selected page is used when opening the element browser. Setting this configuration value changes this behaviour.

filter.description: Define filters for item values. Doesn't work in combination with a wizard.

foreign_table.description: The item-array will be filled with records from the table defined here

hideDeleteIcon.description: Removes the delete icon next to the selector box.

hideMoveIcons.description: Removes the move icons next to the selector box.

hideSuggest.description: Setting this property to true disables the suggest wizard.

localizeReferencesAtParentLocalization.description: Defines whether referenced records should be localized when the current record gets localized. This only applies if references are not stored using MM tables.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the select field

minitems.description: Minimum number of items allowed in the select field

MM.description: This value contains the name of the table in which to store a MM relation. It is used together with foreign_table.

MM_match_fields.description: Array of field => value pairs to both insert and match against when writing/reading MM relations.

MM_opposite_field.description: If you want to make a MM relation editable from the foreign side (bidirectional) of the relation as well, you need to set MM_opposite_field on the foreign side to the field name on the local side.

MM_oppositeUsage.description: In a MM bidirectional relation using match fields the opposite side needs to know about the match fields for certain operations

MM_table_where.description: Additional where clause used when reading MM relations.

multiple.description: Allows the same item more than once in a list.

prepend_tname.description: Will prepend the table name to the stored relations

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: If set to 1 (default), displays a select drop-down, else a select box of given size.

additionalSearchFields.description: Comma-separated list of fields the suggest wizard should also search in

addWhere.description: Allows to define an additional where clause for the searchquery.

cssClass.description: Add a CSS class to every list item of the result list.

maxItemsInResultList.description: Maximum number of results to display.

maxPathTitleLength.description: Maximum number of characters to display when a path element is too long.

minimumCharacters.description: Minimum number of characters needed to start the search.

orderBy.description: Allows to add an ORDER BY part to the search query.

pidList.description: Limit the search to certain pages (and their sub pages).

pidDepth.description: Expand pidList by this number of levels. Has an effect only if pidList has a value.

renderFunc.description: User function to manipulate the displayed records in the results.

searchCondition.description: Additional WHERE clause (not prepended with AND).

searchWholePhrase.description: Searches for the whole phrase, not only the beginning of the word.

prefix.description: userFunction: Provides a string that is displayed in front of the input field.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

fallbackCharacter.description: Character that represents the separator of slug sections, that contain the fieldSeparator.

fields.description: Insert several field names (of type string) that will be considered during slug construction.

fieldSeparator.description: This value will divide the slug parts. If a section value contains this very value, it will be replaced by the value given in fallbackCharacter.

prefixParentPageSlug.description: The slugs of parent pages will be prefixed to the slug for the page its (This option is exclusively for page records. It won't have an effect on any other records.)

regexReplacements.description: Provide regex based definitions for string replacement. Case-insensitive and wildcard replacement is possible.

replacements.description: It allows to replace strings of a slug part.

postModifiers.description: Hook into the generation of a slug via custom TCA generation options.

prependSlash.description: Defines whether a slug field should contain a prepending slash, for example for nested categories with speaking segments.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

searchable.description: Enables search functionality for the field

size.description: Abstract value for the width of the field

useExistingField.description: Enables extending of existing fields defined by TCA.

prefixType.description: Determines how to prefix the field if prefixField is enabled.

displayCond.description: Can be used to display the field only under certain conditions.

onChange.description: Can be used to trigger a reload of the Content Type when this specific field is changed.

fallbackLabelFields.description: Defines which fields should be used as fallback, if labelField is not filled. The first filled field which is found will be used. Can only be used if there is only one labelField field defined.

table.description: Alternative table name for the Collection. Default is identifier with prefix if enabled.

shareAcrossTables.description: Allows to reference a Record Type across multiple tables, if foreign_table is used.

shareAcrossFields.description: Allows to reference a Record Type across multiple fields, if foreign_table is used.

allowedRecordTypes.description: This option allows you to restrict possible record types for the type selector of the child record. The order of definition is used to sort the items. The first item in the list will always be the default type.

collapseAll.description: Show all child-records collapsed (if false, all are expanded)

expandSingle.description: Show only one child-record expanded each time. If a collapsed record is clicked, the currently open one collapses and the clicked one expands.

newRecordLinkAddTitle.description: Adds the title of the foreign_table to the "New record" link.

newRecordLinkTitle.description: Overrides the title of the "New record" link with a localized string. This will work only if newRecordLinkAddTitle is not set to true.

createNewRelationLinkTitle.description: Overrides the link text and title of the "Create new relation" button with a localized string. Only useful, if the element browser is enabled.

levelLinksPosition.description: Defines where to show the "New record" link in relation to the child records.

useCombination.description: This is only useful on bidirectional relations using an intermediate table with attributes. In a "combination" it is possible to edit the attributes AND the related child record itself. If using a foreign_selector, the foreign_unique property must be set to the same field as the foreign_selector.

suppressCombinationWarning.description: Suppresses the warning flash message that will be displayed when using useCombination.

showPossibleLocalizationRecords.description: Show unlocalized files which are in the original language, but not yet localized.

showAllLocalizationLink.description: Defines whether to show the "localize all records" link to fetch untranslated records from the original language.

showSynchronizationLink.description: Defines whether to show a "synchronize" link to update to a 1:1 translation with the original language.

showPossibleRecordsSelector.description: Can be used to hide the foreign record selector from the interface, even if you have a foreign_selector configured. This can be used to keep the technical functionality of the foreign_selector but is useful if you want to replace it with your own implementation using a custom control, see customControls.

elementBrowserEnabled.description: Hides or displays the element browser button in inline records

autoSizeMax.description: The select field will never be smaller than the specified size and never larger than the value of autoSizeMax.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

disableMovingChildrenWithParent.description: Disables that child records get moved along with their parent records.

enableCascadingDelete.description: Usually when the parent record is deleted all attached sys_file_references are deleted. This default behaviour can be disabled here.

customControls.description: A list of custom controls (userFuncs) that can be used to extend the functionality of the collection field.

filter.description: Define filters for item values. Doesn't work in combination with a wizard.

foreign_default_sortby.description: If a field name for foreign_sortby is defined, then this is ignored. Otherwise, this is used as the "ORDER BY" statement to sort the records in the table when listed.

foreign_field.description: The foreign_field is the field of the child record pointing to the parent record. This defines where to store the uid of the parent record.

foreign_label.description: Insert the fieldname of the inline element, that you want to have as the title of the inline element.

foreign_match_fields.description: Array of field-value pairs to both insert and match against when writing/reading IRRE relations. Using the match fields, it is possible to re-use the same child table in more than one field of the parent table by using a match field with different values for each of the use cases.

foreign_selector.description: A selector is used to show all possible child records that could be used to create a relation with the parent record.

foreign_sortby.description: Define a field on the child record that stores the manual sorting information.

foreign_table.description: The item-array will be filled with records from the table defined here

foreign_table_field.description: The field of the child record pointing to the parent record.

foreign_unique.description: Field which must be unique for all children of a parent record.

maxitems.description: Maximum number of items allowed in the select field

minitems.description: Minimum number of items allowed in the select field

MM.description: This value contains the name of the table in which to store a MM relation. It is used together with foreign_table.

MM_opposite_field.description: If you want to make a MM relation editable from the foreign side (bidirectional) of the relation as well, you need to set MM_opposite_field on the foreign side to the field name on the local side.

overrideChildTca.description: Override the TCA of the sys_file_reference records representing the files attached to this record.

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

size.description: If set to 1 (default), displays a select drop-down, else a select box of given size.

symmetric_field.description: This works like foreign_field, but in case of using bidirectional symmetric relations. symmetric_field defines in which field on the foreign_table the uid of the "other" parent is stored.

symmetric_label.description: If set, it overrides the label set in labelField for the inline-view and only if looking to a symmetric relation from the "other" side.

symmetric_sortby.description: This works like foreign_sortby, but in case of using bidirectional symmetric relations.

fields.description: The root fields definition of the Collection.

label.description: Define a label. If not defined, identifier is used as fallback.

linkTitle.description: The link title is displayed when hovering over the tab.

displayCond.description: Can be used to display the field only under certain conditions.

onChange.description: Can be used to trigger a reload of the Content Type when this specific field is changed.
